name: LL VI home
description: Welcome to the next home progression of LL. This program will challenge your body in strength and conditions. This can be challenging at home with little access to heavy weights or machines. This is where your bands will come into play. Tricks to add resistance to bands are by double looping them, tying a knot in them. or getting bands with a higher resistance level. You can also tie the bands or loop them around dumb bells to add double resistance. Either way you choose, the idea is to increase resistance, and lower the volume.
